name: al-eventlens
description: See event publishers and subscribers across your AL / Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central workspace, and the lines that connect them.

alEventLens.cache.enabled.description: Cache parsed .app symbol results in extension global storage, keyed by (appId, version, mtime). Disable to force a full re-parse on session start.

alEventLens.indexOnSave.description: Incrementally re-index AL files when they are saved.

alEventLens.scanAlpackages.description: Scan .alpackages/*.app files in the workspace for publishers (and bundled subscribers, where present) in addition to workspace AL source.

alEventLens.includeAllAppVersions.description: When .alpackages contains multiple versions of the same app (same appId, different Version), index all of them instead of just the highest. Off by default: each appId contributes exactly one set of publishers (the highest Version), matching how the official AL extension resolves dependencies. Turn on for multi-target / platform-version testing setups where every version's publishers should appear.

alEventLens.includeTriggerEvents.description: Synthesize virtual publishers for each Table and Page object covering implicit trigger events (OnAfterDeleteEvent, OnBeforeValidateEvent, etc.).

alEventLens.codeLens.enabled.description: Show a CodeLens above [IntegrationEvent] and [BusinessEvent] declarations with the live subscriber count.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && tsc --outDir dist && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run check-types && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
